name: semsearch
purpose: Local semantic code search: chunk a repo at function/class granularity, embed with a small benchmarked ONNX model, index in sqlite-vec, and answer conceptual queries ('where's the retry logic') with ranked results and an honest confidence floor.
why: On a large codebase, one semantic query returns the relevant chunks instead of many grep+read round-trips - but on a small repo plain grep is cheaper.
reach_for_me_when: you need a conceptual query neither grep (lexical) nor an LSP (symbolic) can answer
you are looking for 'the code that does X' and do not know its name
you want ranked discovery results with a confidence signal, fully local
avoid_when: the repo is small or the thing you want is findable with one grep on an obvious keyword

commands.name: index
commands.summary: Build/refresh the semantic index (incremental by content hash)

commands.name: query
commands.summary: Semantic search; ranked results with a confidence floor

commands.name: models
commands.summary: Show the default model and availability; 'models pull' fetches it

commands.name: self-test
commands.summary: Prove the tool works (model-free sqlite-vec round trip)
